title: THE 2PM CLUB™ BEDFORD - 80s 90s 00s Daytime Disco
description: Bedford, your afternoon revolution starts here. The 2PM Club brings four hours of 80s, 90s and 00s anthems to Bedford Esquires with full club production — confetti cannons, inflatable mic moments, and every iconic tune you still know by heart. From Whitney's soaring choruses to Oasis singalongs, it's daytime disco done properly. No midnight queues, no 2 AM regrets, just pure nostalgic joy when the timing actually works. Dance hard, sing louder, and feel smug when you're home buzzing by 7.
